title: Tell a short story
subtitle: Use first, then, after that.
overview: Read the English aloud, understand the Chinese, then answer with your own real information.

sections.title: A1 focus
rows: First, I woke up at seven.
Finally, I went home and rested.
Can you tell me about your day?
First, I woke up. Then I had breakfast.
首先，我醒了。然后我吃了早餐。

items.en: First, I woke up at seven.
Finally, I went home and rested.
Can you tell me about your day?
First, I woke up. Then I had breakfast.
items.zh: 首先，我醒了。然后我吃了早餐。

items.en: Now make one sentence about your real life.
items.zh: 现在造一个关于你真实生活的句子。

items.en: Read it aloud three times: slow, clear, natural.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you tell me about your day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: First, I woke up. Then I had breakfast.
lines.zh: 首先，我醒了。然后我吃了早餐。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say it one more time, slowly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: First, I woke up. Then I had breakfast.
lines.zh: 首先，我醒了。然后我吃了早餐。

items.en: First, I woke up at seven.
Finally, I went home and rested.
Change one word and say it again.
Use the sentence today if you can.
items.zh: 如果可以，今天就使用这个句子。
